user.title: Connect to Pocket TTS
user.description: Enter the address of the Pocket TTS add-on. On Home Assistant OS use your HA host IP (or homeassistant.local) and port 8000.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Make sure the Pocket TTS add-on is running and its port (8000) is exposed, then check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This Pocket TTS server is already configured.
